core_modules.description: Top-level Sage namespace aggregator; importing this initializes a very large runtime surface.
CLI command registration hub for eval/run-file/notebook/version workflows.
Implements evaluation command behavior for executing Sage expressions/scripts from CLI.
Core interactive interpreter orchestration used by Sage REPL contexts.
Jupyter kernel integration layer for Sage.
Feature/probing subsystem to detect availability of external math engines and tools.
Bootstrap/build CLI dispatcher for package/bootstrap tasks.

cli_commands.name: sage (command family via cli package)
cli_commands.description: Primary Python-side CLI entry wrapper for Sage command execution.

cli_commands.name: bootstrap tooling
cli_commands.description: Package/bootstrap maintenance commands for source builds.

required: Sage runtime environment (full source-build/packaged Sage installation)
Compiled math backends (GAP, PARI, Singular, FLINT, etc.) via Sage distribution
optional: External CAS/interfaces depending on used feature modules
Docker/conda environments provided by repository for reproducible execution
